nasb.text: Now the eyes of Israel were so dim from age that he could not see. Then Joseph brought them close to him, and he kissed them and embraced them.

esv.text: Now the eyes of Israel were dim with age, so that he could not see. So Joseph brought them near him, and he kissed them and embraced them.

cnv.text: 以色列因為年老，眼睛昏花，看不清楚。約瑟領他們到他跟前去，他就與他們親吻，擁抱他們。

ccb.text: 以色列因为年老眼睛已经昏花。约瑟把儿子带到他面前，他就亲吻他们、拥抱他们。

csbs.text: 以色列的眼睛因年老昏花，不能够看见。约瑟就让他们靠近他；他就亲吻他们，拥抱他们。
